titleStmt.title: SII 5, appendix, no. 53: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 53. (A.R. No. 53 of 1888). INSIDE THE BACK GOPURA. See No. 123 of South-Indian Inscriptions, Vol. I.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Om śubhamastu . vamśavaryye śakasyābde śrīviriñceśvarāya
ca śrīmadacyutarāyasya lokasya ca viśeṣataḥ . prakhyā
takaraṇikkena gautamānvayajena ca . vīrayākhyena
dattā hi grāmaśāsanamīdraśam . svasti śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvara
rājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīmada ccutadevamahārā yar piṟutivirājyam
paṇṇiyaruḷāniṉṟa śakābtam 1000 4 100 5 10 4- ṉmeṟ cellāniṉṟa nandanavatsara
ttu kum panāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu caturdda ciyum manda vāramum peṟṟa Aviṭṭattu nā
ḷ civarāttiri puṇya kālattile Uṭaiyār vaḻittuṇainayinārkku karaṇi
kka vīra ppayan viṭṭa grā maṅkaḷukku tharmaśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi nammaṭa
mākaṇaikkuc cellum kāvanūrccirmaiyil ciṟaleri grā mam Oṉṟu
m Ituvum nammiṭa Umpaḷikai grā mamāna kiḻai virācūr Agra hāram niṅkalāka tantapaṭi Aṅkarāyaṉkuppa muḷpaṭa
gr Āmam Oṉṟum Āka grā mam Iraṇṭum Uṭaiyār vaḻittuṇainayinārkku dharmmaśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Inta grā mam
Iraṇṭukkum paṟākkuc cellum nañcai puñcai nāṟpāṟ kellaiyum māvaṭ Ai maravaṭai cakala camutāyapirāttiyu muḷpaṭa
rekai ciṟalerigrā mam Oṉṟukku poṉ muppatu � I 3 100- ḷa � Aṅkarāyaṉkuppa muḷpaṭṭa virācūrkku poṉ 3 10 � I 3 100- ḷa Āka
grā mam Iraṇṭukkum rekai poṉ 6 10- m I 6 100- ḷattukkum naṭakkum Upayam nāḷ Oṉṟukkut tiruvantikkāppuveḷai
yil nammiṭa Aviupayamāka Amutukku cata 3 payaṟu � ney n=ta vellam palam 1 kaṟiyamutu palam 6 tiruviḷakku tā viśeṣa pū
cai samkrama Ubha yam cāttukkāppu Eṇṇai � paḻam 2 100 teṅkāy 10 teṉ 2 carkkarai 4 tirumeṉippūccu palam
10 kaṟpūram kaḻañcu 1 kuṅkumappū kaḻañcu 1 naidyem campurāyanmaṇṭa pattil nainār Ēṟiyaruḷukaiyil Amutukku
payaṟu ṅa ney 6 vella śva 8 10 tiruviti Eḻuntaruḷappaṇṇak kūliāḷ koṭi kuṭaikku ṭṭa 2 pantattukku Eṇṇai
vum vaikācimātam vimāṉa teṟpattirunāḷ nāṉ muṉṟukku naivedyam ḷu naraipayaṟu 3 10 4 vellam palam
ney 3 kaṟiyamutu palam � miḷaku � Uppu � tirumenikkuc cāttac cantaṉam pala nattukku cantanam palam 100 8 Āka
cantanam palam 100 2 10 kaṟpūram kaḻañcu nda kuṅkumam kaḻañcu 3 tiruviti Eḻuntaru kuṭai kūliyāḷukku nāḷ muṉṟukku
ṭṭa 6 Eṇṇai � Ippaṭi kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa Avacaram 3� samkramaubha yamum � ḷum naṭa kkumpaṭikku viṭṭa ciṟaleri
grā mamum kiḻaivirācūr Agra hāra m niṅkalānatiṟappum Aṅkarāyar ḷpaṭṭa grā mam Oṉṟum Āka grā mam
Iraṇṭum candrāditya varai naṭakkakkaṭavatākavum .
Digital edition of SII 5, appendix, no. 53 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
